channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Consequences of Gavin Newsom's Fiscal Mismanagement
item.description: Representative Vince Fong aims to curb California's overspending and provide relief to business owners.

item.title: California's Dysfunctional Elections
item.description: It does not have to be this way.

item.title: Welcome to New York: Trump booed during national anthem, though crowd reserves biggest ire for Spurs
item.description: President Trump faced a chorus of boos during the national anthem Monday as he took in the New York Knicks' first home game in the NBA Finals.

item.title: Trump says pilots are fine after U.S. helicopter crashes near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A U.S. Army helicopter crashed near the Strait of Hormuz, but President Trump said the two crew members aboard were not injured in the incident near t...
